hero.subtitle: Send a parcel. Pay only on delivery — if you choose. Reliable parcel delivery, sender to receiver. Choose MoMo, Airtel Money, or Cash on Delivery with a small deposit. Track every step, verify with a 6-digit code at the door.

problem.title: Delivery in Kigali shouldn't feel like a gamble.
problem.subtitle: Every day, people across Rwanda still face these issues:
problem.card1_title: Do you trust who delivers your package?
problem.card1_body: Stop guessing. Our couriers are vetted, ID-verified and tracked end-to-end.
problem.card2_title: Do you lose time not knowing where it is?
problem.card2_body: No more waiting all day. Watch your parcel move in real time.
problem.card3_title: Have you received a damaged product?
problem.card3_body: Never again. We treat your parcel like it's our own.

promise.title: Your time and your packages — that's what we value the most.
promise.subtitle: We make sure every parcel arrives on time and safe.

features.title: A simpler way to ship
features.f1_body: Pin the receiver's address on a map. We handle the rest.
features.f2_body: Pay a small deposit. Receiver pays the rest at the door.
features.f3_body: Receiver gives a code to confirm delivery. No mistakes.

waitlist.title: Be the first to know when Parcela goes live.
waitlist.subtitle: Drop your email and we'll send you early access plus your 40% first-month discount.
waitlist.success: You're in! We'll be in touch soon.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
